puzzles.title: Clue 1
puzzles.text:
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears.
I have nobody, but I come alive with wind.
What am I?

puzzles.title: Clue 2
puzzles.text:
You measure my life in hours and I serve you by expiring.
I'm quick when I'm thin and slow when I'm fat.
What am I?

puzzles.title: Clue 3
puzzles.text:
I have cities, but no houses.
I have rivers, but no water.
What am I?
